summary: Recording quality is not described, but reviewers rave about the nostalgic Boston Garden performance.
review: The three fan reviews are overwhelmingly positive, recalling a chilly Boston night that left a lasting impression and even a chance encounter with the taper. The only criticism is aimed at a guest accordionist who “butchered” an otherwise beautiful rendition of "Brokedown Palace," but overall the show is described as very good.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive sentiment about the performance (70% weight) combined with no concrete information on audio fidelity (30% weight) yields a solid above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not comment on soundboard, audience mix, clarity or other technical aspects; only performance is discussed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviews focus on the overall vibe of a cold Boston night rather than detailed set pacing.
